# Rohan Singh

> Personal site of Rohan Singh, a computer science student at the University of Virginia (BSCS, Data Science minor, May 2027) and machine learning engineer intern at Expedia Group. He builds data pipelines, ML-backed products, and tools he actually uses.

## Projects

- [Marathon Prep Bot](https://rohansingh04.com/projects/marathon-prep-bot): TypeScript pipeline that turns more than 1,300 workouts into a private coaching system and a privacy-safe public dashboard.
- [Signal](https://rohansingh04.com/projects/spotify-recommender): music discovery over the real Spotify catalog with explained picks and no login required.
- [Shortlist](https://rohansingh04.com/projects/movie-recommender): movie recommendations from a LightGBM ranking model served by a Go API, beating its baseline by 11.8% with responses in about 17 milliseconds.
- [Health Recap](https://rohansingh04.com/projects/health-tracker-ios): native SwiftUI morning recap of sleep and movement with overlap-safe sleep math and 11 domain tests.
- [Parking Shark](https://rohansingh04.com/projects/parking-shark): peer-to-peer parking marketplace built on a 13-table MySQL model with conflict-safe reservations.
- [Personal Site](https://rohansingh04.com/projects/personal-site): this site, built with Next.js 16 and TypeScript, pulling live Spotify, GitHub, and fitness data.

## Notes

- [My marathon coach is a chat window](https://rohansingh04.com/notes/llm-marathon-coach): how he built a training system where an LLM writes the plans, a pipeline computes the numbers, and code keeps everyone honest.
- [How this site is built, and who builds it](https://rohansingh04.com/notes/how-this-site-is-built): the stack, the design rules, the test suite that guards the truth, and the honest role AI agents play in maintaining it.

## Pages

- [Resume](https://rohansingh04.com/resume): education, work experience, selected projects, and a downloadable PDF resume.
- [Now](https://rohansingh04.com/now): what he is working on and training for right now.
- [Fitness](https://rohansingh04.com/fitness): live marathon-training dashboard fed by his own workout pipeline.
- [Globe](https://rohansingh04.com/globe): interactive 3D globe of places he has been.
- [History](https://rohansingh04.com/history): full timeline of work and school.
